basic_details.job_title: DRDO TBRL Paid Internship Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 37 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Candidates should download and read the DRDO TBRL Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 27 years as on 30-06-2026. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.details: Aerospace / Aeronautical Engineering: Pursuing B.E./B.Tech sixth semester onwards from a recognized institute with a minimum of 75% marks and no backlogs. Chemical Engineering: Pursuing B.E./B.Tech sixth semester onwards from a recognized institute with a minimum of 75% marks and no backlogs. Computer Science Engineering: Pursuing B.E./B.Tech sixth semester onwards from a recognized institute with a minimum of 75% marks and no backlogs. Electronics & Communication Engineering: Pursuing B.E./B.Tech sixth semester onwards from a recognized institute with a minimum of 75% marks and no backlogs. Instrumentation: Pursuing B.E./B.Tech sixth semester onwards from a recognized institute with a minimum of 75% marks and no backlogs. Mechanical Engineering: Pursuing B.E./B.Tech sixth semester onwards from a recognized institute with a minimum of 75% marks and no backlogs. Civil Engineering: Pursuing B.E./B.Tech sixth semester onwards from a recognized institute with a minimum of 75% marks and no backlogs. Electrical Engineering: Pursuing B.E./B.Tech sixth semester onwards from a recognized institute with a minimum of 75% marks and no backlogs. Chemistry: Pursuing second year M.Sc from a recognized university with a minimum of 75% marks and no backlogs.

selection_process: Merit based on academic percentage/CGPA Online/telephonic interview/interaction if required Document verification Police verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DRDO TBRL Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://drdo.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DRDO TBRL Paid Intern posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the DRDO TBRL Paid Intern posts is 25th May 2026. Candidates are advised to ensure their applications reach the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Paid Intern positions?
faq.answer: Candidates must be pursuing B.E./B.Tech/B.Sc.Engg from the sixth semester onwards with at least 75% marks, or be in the second year of M.Sc with a minimum of 75% marks. No backlogs are permitted.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the DRDO TBRL Paid Intern recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the Paid Intern posts is 27 years as of 30th June 2026. Specific age relaxation details are not provided in the current notification summary.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Paid Intern posts at DRDO TBRL?
faq.answer: There are a total of 37 vacancies for the Paid Intern positions across various engineering and science disciplines at the Terminal Ballistics Research Laboratory (DRDO TBRL).

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Paid Intern role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Paid Intern positions will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 5,000/-.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the DRDO TBRL Paid Intern recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as instructed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. Which departments are recruiting for Paid Interns at DRDO TBRL?
faq.answer: DRDO TBRL is recruiting Paid Interns in departments such as Aerospace/Aeronautical Engineering, Chemical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Instrumentation, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, and Chemistry.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Paid Intern positions?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on merit through academic percentage/CGPA. It may also include an online/telephonic interview, document verification, and police verification.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for the DRDO TBRL Paid Intern recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for the General/OBC categories, implying that the application is free for all candidates.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of DRDO, which is https://drdo.gov.in. Links to the official website and notification are provided in the Important Links section.
